SESSION.NAME: defaultSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnostic session enables the default diagnostic session in the server(s) and does not support any diagnostic application timeout handling provisions (e.g., TesterPresent service is not necessary to keep the session active). A server shall always start the default diagnostic session when powered up. If no other diagnostic session is started, then the default diagnostic session shall be running as long as the server is powered.

SESSION.NAME: programmingSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession enables all diagnostic services required to support the memory programming of a server. Regardless of whether the programmingSession runs in boot software or not, the ECU shall automatically suspend logging of DTCs and suspend transmission of non-diagnostic frames when entering the programmingSession.

SESSION.NAME: extendedDiagnosticSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession is used to enable timed diagnostic service functionality (e.g., I/O control). The diagnostic functionality in this session shall also include all supported diagnostic functionality supported in the defaultSession.

SESSION.NAME: TKPSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession is used for internal DIDs and for activation of the ToolBoxLoader routine.

SESSION.NAME: ToolboxLoaderSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession is used for the activation of the ToolBoxLoader.

DTC_FAILURE_TYPE.DESCRIPTION: Signal Has Too Many Transitions / Events

DTC_SNAPSHOT_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The first time since DTC information was cleared or the DTC was aged that DTC status bit 3 (confirmedDTC) is set to 1.
The last time DTC fault detection counter reaches its maximum value of +127.

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #2
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter last reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). The operation cycles during which the test was not completed shall be excluded

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #4
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles during which the DTC fault detection counter reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared).

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: DTC Fault Detection Counter
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The purpose of this counter is to provide a mechanism for filtering the results of a low-level fault detection process so that test results (pass and fail) can be qualified before setting any DTC status bits.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: High Friction Inside Power Steering

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: If all of the following conditions are fulfilled: 1. Hardwired ignition is ON 2. Power steering assist is provided 3. Ambient temperature is over 0°C
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU detects high friction in the mechanic. Pass Criteria: This DTC is never deactivated.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: In the first power cycle, when the failure is detected: 1. EPAS_Failure signal is set to SERVICE_POWER_STEERING (0x2) value 2. SteMdule_D_Stat signal is set to EPAS_Failure2 (0x5) value if high friction was detected in the actual power cycle In the second power cycle, after the failure is detected: 1. EPAS_Failure signal is set to SERVICE_POWER_STEERING_NOW (0x3) value 2. SteMdule_D_Stat signal is set to EPAS_Failure3 (0x6) value if high friction was detected in the previous power cycle 3. Power steering assist is disabled for remaining lifecycle
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: In the first power cycle, when the failure is detected: 1. Return ability is reduced; noise from gear; freezing water causes vibration. 2. Driver will be noticed with the message "Service Power Steering" In the second power cycle, after the failure is detected: 1. Power steering assist is disabled for remaining lifecycle 2. Driver will be noticed with the message "Service Power Steering Now"

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Power steering Calibration Data

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU detects incompatible tuning identification code. Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if the ECU detects compatible tuning identification code.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: 1. EPAS_Failure signal is set to POWER_STRG_ASSIST_FAULT (0x1) value 2. SteMdule_D_Stat signal is set to System_Failure (0x4) value 3. Fault will be active in the current ignition cycle and will be tested again at the following power cycle
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: 1. Power steering assist is disabled for remaining ignition cycle 2. Driver will be noticed with the message "Power Steering Assist Fault"

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Steering Angle Sensor

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU detects steering angle sensor failure. Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if the ECU detects steering angle sensor failure is not present in the next power cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: 1. Relative Steering Pinion Angle (SteWhlRelInit2_An_Sns signal) and Relative Steering Pinion Angle Offset (SteWhlOSRelInit2An_Est) set to faulty value 2. All of the Steering Pinion Angle related functions are disabled.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: 1. All of the Steering Pinion Angle related functions are injured for the remaining of the power cycle.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU detects any of the following steering angle sensor related comparisong failure: A) Belt jump detected (Rotor Position based Relative Pinion Angle and the Steering Wheel Angle sensor based Pinion Angle values difference more than 10 degrees) B) Belt jump diagnostic is not operable due used sensor's failure C) Relative Steering Pinion Angle (SteWhlRelInit2_An_Sns signal) gets faulty (this is a collector diagnostic, which activated if the signal can not fulfill the requirements, most case not the root cause) D) Relative Steering Pinion Angle (SteWhlRelInit2_An_Sns signal) gets greater than physical rack travel Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if the ECU does not detect the steering angle sensor related comparisong failure next power cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: In the power cycle, when the failure is detected: A) B) C) D) Relative Steering Pinion Angle (SteWhlRelInit2_An_Sns signal) and Relative Steering Pinion Angle Offset (SteWhlOSRelInit2An_Est signal) set to faulty value One ignition cycle later, when the failure is not detected any more: A) D) Operation is normal. B) Relative Steering Pinion Angle (SteWhlRelInit2_An_Sns signal) and Relative Steering Pinion Angle Offset (SteWhlOSRelInit2An_Est) set to faulty value till steering wheel moved a little bit C) Depends on the root cause existence.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: In the power cycle, when the failure is detected: - All of the Steering Pinion Angle related functions are injured for the remaining of the power cycle. One power cycle later in case of B) AND if the failure is not detected any more AND till steering wheel is not moved a little bit: - All of the Steering Pinion Angle related functions are injured in case of B) failure criteria One power cycle later in case of A), C), D): - No symptom

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Steering Shaft Torque Sensor 1

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU detects steering torque sensor failure. Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if the ECU detects steering torque sensor failure is no longer present.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: 1. Assist will be disabled or highly reduced 2. EPAS_Failure signal is set to POWER_STRG_ASSIST_FAULT (0x1) value 3. SteMdule_D_Stat signal is set to System_Failure (0x4) value 4. Fault will be active in the current ignition cycle and will be tested again at the following ignition cycle
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: 1. No power steering assist or highly reduced steering assist for remaining ignition cycle 2. Driver will be noticed with the message "Power Steering Assist Fault"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU detects motor angle position sensor failure. Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if the ECU detects motor angle position sensor failure is no longer present.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: 1. Assist will be disabled or highly reduced 2. EPAS_Failure signal is set to POWER_STRG_ASSIST_FAULT (0x1) value 3. DTC.DESCRIPTION: Overheat Sensor

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: If all of the following conditions are fulfilled: 1) Hardwired ignition is ON 2) Power steering assist is provided
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU measures overtemperature. Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if the ECU does not measures overtemperature any more.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: 1. EPAS_Failure signal is kept on EPAS_OK_NO_MESSAGE (0x0) value 2. SteMdule_D_Stat signal is set to Normal_Op_Limited_Assist (0x1) value
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: 1. No power steering assist or highly reduced steering assist for remaining power cycle

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With ECM/PCM "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: If all of the following conditions are fulfilled: - battery voltage is higher than 10V - Ignition_Status signal has "Run" (0x4)value - PwPckTq_D_Stat signal has "PwPckOn_TqAvailable" (0x3) value - EPS/PSCM's sent SteMdule_D_Stat signal does not show internal failure (0x4, 0x5, 0x6) values - Hardwired ignition is ON - 5100 milliseconds have been elapsed after once all the above condition met together
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) any of the following scenarios are met: SCENARIO_A if all of the following conditions are met: 1) Following message has timeout for more than 100ms: VehicleOperatingModes_HS2 SCENARIO_B if all of the following conditions are met: 1) Torque Steer Compensation OR Brake Pull Reduction functionality is activated via ECU Configuration DIDs 2) Following message has timeout for more than 1000ms: EnVehicleSpThrottle2_HS2 Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if all of DTC related messages arrives in time: VehicleOperatingModes_HS2, EnVehicleSpThrottle2_HS2
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: FIH functional expert can describe the ECU's behavior.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Torque Steer Compensation OR Brake Pull Reduction functionality is injured. Power steering assist activation and deactivation does not happen according the expectations, because the control signals are missing.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Anti-Lock Brake System (ABS) Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: If all of the following conditions are fulfilled: - battery voltage is higher than 10V - Ignition_Status signal has "Run" (0x4)value - PwPckTq_D_Stat signal has "PwPckOn_TqAvailable" (0x3) value - EPS/PSCM's sent SteMdule_D_Stat signal does not show internal failure (0x4, 0x5, 0x6) values - Hardwired ignition is ON - 5100 milliseconds have been elapsed after once all the above condition met together
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) any of the following scenarios are met: SCENARIO_A if all of the following conditions are met: 1) Following message has timeout for more than 100ms: BrakeSysFeatures SCENARIO_B if all of the following conditions are met: 1) Following message has timeout for more than 100ms: BrakeSnData_2 SCENARIO_C if all of the following conditions are met: 1) Torque Steer Compensation OR Brake Pull Reduction OR Lane Departure Warning OR Lane Keeping Assist OR Pull Drift Compensation functionality is activated via ECU Configuration DIDs 2) Following message has timeout for more than 100ms: BrakeSnData_3 SCENARIO_D if all of the following conditions are met: 1) Brake Pull Reduction functionality is activated via ECU Configuration DIDs 2) Following message has timeout for more than 100ms: BrakeSnData_4 SCENARIO_E if all of the following conditions are met: 2) Following message has timeout for more than 100ms: WheelSpeed SCENARIO_F if all of the following conditions are met: 1) Torque Steer Compensation OR Brake Pull Reduction OR Lane Departure Warning OR Lane Keeping Assist functionality is activated via ECU Configuration DIDs 2) Following message has timeout for more than 100ms: ABS_BrkBst_Data SCENARIO_G if all of the following conditions are met: 1) Torque Steer Compensation OR Brake Pull Reduction OR Lane Departure Warning OR Lane Keeping Assist functionality is activated via ECU Configuration DIDs 2) Following message has timeout for more than 100ms: DesiredTorqBrk SCENARIO_H if all of the following conditions are met: 1) Torque Steer Compensation OR Brake Pull Reduction functionality is activated via ECU Configuration DIDs 2) Following message has timeout for more than 100ms: WheelData Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if all of DTC related messages arrives in time: BrakeSysFeatures, BrakeSnData_2, BrakeSnData_3, BrakeSnData_4, WheelSpeed, WheelData, ABS_BrkBst_Data, DesiredTorqBrk
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: FIH functional expert can describe the ECU's behavior. Default vehicle speed characteristics are activated in functions.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Torque Steer Compensation OR Brake Pull Reduction OR Lane Departure Warning OR Lane Keeping Assist OR Pull Drift Compensation functionality is injured. Power steering assist activation and deactivation does not happen according the expectations, because the control signals are missing. Power steering assist is reduced.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if all of the following conditions are met: 1) VehicleOperatingModes_HS2 message's PrplWhlTot2_Tq_Actl signal has NoDataExists (0xFFFE) or Fault (0x7FFF) Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if all of DTC related messages arrives with correct value: VehicleOperatingModes_HS2

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received from Anti-Lock Brake System (ABS) Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: If all of the following conditions are fulfilled: - battery voltage is higher than 10V - Ignition_Status signal has "Run" (0x4)value - PwPckTq_D_Stat signal has "PwPckOn_TqAvailable" (0x3) value - EPS/PSCM's sent SteMdule_D_Stat signal does not show internal failure (0x4, 0x5, 0x6) values - Hardwired ignition is ON - 5100 milliseconds have been elapsed after once all the above condition met together
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) any of the following scenarios are met: SCENARIO_A if all of the following conditions are met: 1) PSCM can not calculated reliable vehicle speed SCENARIO_B if all of the following conditions are met: 1) CRC (checksum) OR alive counter problem detected on BrakeSysFeatures message SCENARIO_C if all of the following conditions are met: 1) BrakeSnData_2 message's SteWhlComp_An_Est signal has Fault (0xFFF) value SCENARIO_D if all of the following conditions are met: 1) Torque Steer Compensation OR Brake Pull Reduction OR Lane Departure Warning OR Lane Keeping Assist OR Pull Drift Compensation functionality is activated via ECU Configuration DIDs 2) BrakeSnData_3 message's VehYawComp_W_Actl signal has NoDataExists (0xFFE) or Fault (0xFFF) value SCENARIO_E if all of the following conditions are met: 1) Torque Steer Compensation OR Brake Pull Reduction OR Lane Departure Warning OR Lane Keeping Assist OR Pull Drift Compensation functionality is activated via ECU Configuration DIDs 2) BrakeSnData_3 message's VehLatComp_A_Actl signal has NoDataExists (0x3FE) or Fault (0x3FF) value SCENARIO_F if all of the following conditions are met: 1) Brake Pull Reduction functionality is activated via ECU Configuration DIDs 2) BrakeSnData_4 message's VehLatComp_A_Actl signal has Unknown (0x1FFE) or Fault (0x1FFF) value SCENARIO_G if all of the following conditions are met: 1) WheelSpeed message's WhlFl_W_Meas OR WhlFl_W_Meas OR WhlFr_W_Meas OR WhlRl_W_Meas signal has Unknown (0x7FFE) or Fault (0x7FFF) value SCENARIO_H if all of the following conditions are met: 1) Torque Steer Compensation OR Brake Pull Reduction OR Lane Departure Warning OR Lane Keeping Assist functionality is activated via ECU Configuration DIDs 2) ABS_BrkBst_Data message's YawStabilityIndex signal has NoDataExists (0x1FE) or Fault (0x1FF) value Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if all of DTC related messages arrives with correct value: BrakeSysFeatures, BrakeSnData_2, BrakeSnData_3, BrakeSnData_4, WheelSpeed, ABS_BrkBst_Data
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: FIH functional expert can describe the ECU's behavior. Default vehicle speed characteristics are activated in functions.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Torque Steer Compensation OR Brake Pull Reduction OR Lane Departure Warning OR Lane Keeping Assist OR Pull Drift Compensation functionality is injured. Power steering assist activation and deactivation does not happen according the expectations, because the control signals are missing. Power steering assist is reduced.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Parking Assist Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: If all of the following conditions are fulfilled: - battery voltage is higher than 10V - Ignition_Status signal has "Run" (0x4)value - PwPckTq_D_Stat signal has "PwPckOn_TqAvailable" (0x3) value - EPS/PSCM's sent SteMdule_D_Stat signal does not show internal failure (0x4, 0x5, 0x6) values - Hardwired ignition is ON - 5100 milliseconds have been elapsed after once all the above condition met together
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if all of the following conditions are met: 1) Semi-Automatic Parallel Park OR Active Park Assist functionality is activated via ECU Configuration DIDs 2) ParkAid_Data_HS2 message's ExtSteeringAngleReq2 signal has Unknown (0x7FFE) or Invalid (0x7FFF) value Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if all of DTC related messages arrives with correct value: ParkAid_Data_HS2
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: FIH functional expert can describe the ECU's behavior.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Semi-Automatic Parallel Park OR Active Park Assist functionality is injured.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Image Processing Module A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: If all of the following conditions are fulfilled: - battery voltage is higher than 10V - Ignition_Status signal has "Run" (0x4)value - PwPckTq_D_Stat signal has "PwPckOn_TqAvailable" (0x3) value - EPS/PSCM's sent SteMdule_D_Stat signal does not show internal failure (0x4, 0x5, 0x6) values - Hardwired ignition is ON - 5100 milliseconds have been elapsed after once all the above condition met together
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) any of the following scenarios are met: SCENARIO_A if all of the following conditions are met: 1) Lane Departure Warning OR Lane Keeping Assist functionality is activated via ECU Configuration DIDs 2) Lane_Assist_Data1 message's LaCurvature_No_Calc signal has Fault (0xFFF) value SCENARIO_B if all of the following conditions are met: 1) Lane Departure Warning OR Lane Keeping Assist functionality is activated via ECU Configuration DIDs 2) Lane_Assist_Data1 message's LaRefAng_No_Req signal has Fault (0xFFF) value Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if all of DTC related messages arrives with correct value: Lane_Assist_Data1
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: FIH functional expert can describe the ECU's behavior.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Lane Departure Warning OR Lane Keeping Assist functionality is injured.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU's SW or HW watchdog detects failure. Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if the ECU's SW or HW watchdog does not detect failure any more.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: 1. Assist will be disabled or highly reduced 2. EPAS_Failure signal is set to POWER_STRG_ASSIST_FAULT (0x1) value 3. SteMdule_D_Stat signal is set to System_Failure (0x4) value 4. Fault will be active in the current ignition cycle and will be tested again at the following ignition cycle
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: 1. No power steering assist or highly reduced steering assist for remaining ignition cycle 2. Driver will be noticed with the message "Power Steering Assist Fault"

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Initial Configuration Not Complete

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU detects an incomplete manufacturing configuration (CAL parameter file is missing, ECU Configuration DIDs have been not executed). DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: 1. EPAS_Failure signal is set to POWER_STRG_ASSIST_FAULT (0x1) value 2. SteMdule_D_Stat signal is set to System_Failure (0x4) value 3. Fault will be active in the current ignition cycle and will be tested again at the following ignition cycle
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: 1. Driver will be noticed with the message "Power Steering Assist Fault"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU detects an internal flash or RAM memory failure. Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if the ECU detects the internal flash or RAM memory failure is no longer present.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: 1. Assist will be disabled or highly reduced 2. EPAS_Failure signal is set to POWER_STRG_ASSIST_FAULT (0x1) value 3. SteMdule_D_Stat signal is set to System_Failure (0x4) value 4. Fault will be active in the current ignition cycle and will be tested again at the following ignition cycle
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: 1. No power steering assist or highly reduced steering assist for remaining ignition cycle 2. Driver will be noticed with the message "Power Steering Assist Fault"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Runs after hardwired ignition gets active.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU detects an internal electronic failure OR ice inside the steering gear OR mechanical blocking. Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if the ECU detects the internal electronic failure is not present in the next ignition cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: 1. Assist will be disabled or highly reduced 2. EPAS_Failure signal is set to POWER_STRG_ASSIST_FAULT (0x1) value 3. SteMdule_D_Stat signal is set to System_Failure (0x4) value 4. Fault will be active in the current ignition cycle and will be tested again at the following ignition cycle
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: 1. No power steering assist OR highly reduced steering assist OR steering vibration for remaining power cycle 2. Driver will be noticed with the message "Power Steering Assist Fault"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the LimpHomeCounter reaches the limp home activation limit (SSH_LimpHomeDTCThreshold) Pass Criteria: This DTC is deactivated only after Clear DTC (service $14).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: 1. Assist will be disabled 2. EPAS_Failure signal is set to POWER_STRG_ASSIST_FAULT (0x1) value 3. SteMdule_D_Stat signal is set to System_Failure (0x4) value 4. Fault will be active till DTCs are cleared with Clear DTC (service $14)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: 1. No power steering assist 2. Driver will be noticed with the message "Power Steering Assist Fault"

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Control Module Improper Shutdown Performance

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Check is executed one after after power ON
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU detects power loss in previous power cycle. Pass Criteria: This DTC goes automatically to inactive state in the next power cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: No action beside the logging of the lost supply voltage DTC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Asssist loss can be detected by the driver.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Battery Voltage

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: If all of the following conditions are fulfilled: 1) Hardwired ignition is ON 2) 5000 milliseconds have been elapsed start-up 3) Power steering assist is provided
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU measures lower than 8V battery voltage Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if the ECU measures higher than 9V battery voltage
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: 1. Assist will be disabled 2. EPAS_Failure signal is kept on EPAS_OK_NO_MESSAGE (0x0) value 3. SteMdule_D_Stat signal is set to Normal_Op_Limited_Assist (0x1) value

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail Criteria: This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU measures the battery voltage between 8V and 11V Pass Criteria: This DTC goes inactive if the ECU measures higher than 11V battery voltage
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: 1. Assist will be slightly or highly reduced 2. EPAS_Failure signal is kept on EPAS_OK_NO_MESSAGE (0x0) value 3. SteMdule_D_Stat signal is set to Normal_Op_Limited_Assist (0x1) value
